integrations.helpTitle: How to Get Your WordPress Credentials

help.urlDesc: Enter the exact URL of your WordPress site (e.g., https://yoursite.com). Make sure it matches exactly - including http/https and www/non-www.
help.usernameDesc: Use your WordPress login username (not your display name or email). Find it in: WP Admin → Users → Your Profile → Username field.
help.appPassStep1: Go to: WP Admin → Users → Profile (your account)
help.appPassStep3: Enter a name (e.g., "SEO Agent") and click "Add New Application Password"
help.appPassStep4: Copy the generated password (format: xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx)
help.appPassStep5: Paste it in the field below

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about SEO Agent

q1.question: Do I need a credit card to start?
q1.answer: No, you can start with the free plan without needing a credit card. Upgrade anytime when you need more features.

q2.question: How often is the data updated?
q2.answer: Data is updated daily for the Free plan, every 6 hours for Pro, and hourly for Enterprise plans.

q3.question: Can I track multiple websites?
q3.answer: Yes, depending on your plan: 2 websites for Free, 3 for Basic, 5 for Pro, and unlimited for Premium/Enterprise.

q4.question: How does multi-country tracking work?
q4.answer: You can select from over 200 countries (like Google Austria, Germany, USA). The system checks your ranking in each local Google separately, giving you accurate country-specific data.

q5.question: Which AI models are supported?
q5.answer: We support OpenAI (GPT-5.2, GPT-4.1), Claude (3.5 Sonnet, 3 Opus), Google Gemini (2.0 Flash, 1.5 Pro), Perplexity Sonar, and our local Dpro model.

q6.question: How do I connect the system with ChatGPT or Claude?
q6.answer: We provide MCP API that allows you to connect the system with Claude Desktop or ChatGPT. You can check SEO and write content directly from the chat. Visit our MCP Setup page for detailed instructions.

q7.question: Can I publish directly to WordPress?
q7.answer: Yes! You can connect your WordPress site and publish with one click. Support for Shopify, Webflow, and Wix is coming soon.

q8.question: Do you support search engines other than Google?
q8.answer: Yes, we support Google, Bing, Yahoo, and DuckDuckGo.

q9.question: How is the SEO score for content calculated?
q9.answer: We check more than 15 factors: word count, keyword density, heading structure, internal and external links, image alt text, meta description, and more. The score is out of 100.

q10.question: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
q10.answer: Absolutely! You can cancel your subscription at any time without additional fees or conditions.

autoConnect.doneText: On first use, your AI assistant will open a tab on our site, ask you to approve the connection, and redirect back automatically. After that every call is handled by the access token it received.

whatIs.title: What is MCP (Model Context Protocol)?
whatIs.description1: MCP is a standard protocol that allows AI assistants like ChatGPT and Claude to connect with external tools and services.
whatIs.description2: With our MCP integration, you can access your SEO data, check rankings, analyze keywords, and generate optimized content - all from within your AI chat.
whatIs.benefit4: No code required for basic setup

speed.title: Speed & Efficiency
speed.point2: No need to switch between tools

q1.question: What is MCP and why should I use it?
q1.answer: MCP lets you access your SEO data directly from AI chats like Claude or ChatGPT, making your workflow faster and more efficient.

q2.question: Is MCP free to use?
q2.answer: Yes! MCP integration is included in all plans. You just need an API key.

q3.question: Does this work with the free ChatGPT?
q3.answer: Custom GPTs require ChatGPT Plus or Team subscription. Claude Desktop works with any plan.

q4.question: How do I get an API key?
q4.answer: Go to Profile → API Keys and generate a new key with the permissions you need.

q5.question: Can I revoke API access?
q5.answer: Yes, you can delete or revoke API keys anytime from your profile.

q6.question: What data can I access via MCP?
q6.answer: All your domains, keywords, rankings, GSC data, posts, and competitor information.

q7.question: Can I publish directly to WordPress via MCP?
q7.answer: Yes! If you've connected WordPress in settings, you can publish from the chat.

q8.question: Is there a rate limit?
q8.answer: API rate limits depend on your plan: Free (100/day), Pro (1000/day), Enterprise (unlimited).
